metadata.title: Happy Birthday (Jungle DnB)
metadata.description: Happy Birthday with erratic, jungle-influenced DnB breakbeats. Same melody, key, and arrangement as the standard DnB version, but the drums are chopped and syncopated — four rotating bar patterns with unexpected kick placements, snare flams, ghost note cascades, and irregular hi-hat accents. The kind of breakbeat that never lets you predict the next hit.
